creator: simon@nitro.dk
text:
I have the same problem, but I think the p5-Tk should be some kind
of option (WITH_TKMIB ?) since there often is no reason to have the GUI on
servers.

The p5-SNMP dependency is not a really usable since it creates a cyclic
dependency (p5-SNMP depends on net-SNMP)..

To solve this cycle perhaps a special port should be made for tkmib? Then
the "problem" with the p5-Tk dependency on servers could also be solved.

Simon
